title: GitHub Weekly Trending
lede: Sync GitHub’s weekly open-source trends once a day, with bilingual explanations generated by the local Claude Code CLI.
staleNotice: GitHub refresh failed, so the latest cached list is shown.
aiFailed: Claude explanations are unavailable: {{error}}. Cards will show GitHub descriptions first.
emptyDesc: GitHub Trending did not return repositories. Try again later.
